title: FreshCart
description: Modern e-commerce web app with authentication and responsive UI.

title: LetsGPT
description: Full-stack AI chat platform with community features.

title: Bookmarker
description: A simple web app to save, manage, and visit favorite websites. Includes form validation, Local Storage, and easy bookmark management.

title: Saraha App Backend
description: Backend for an anonymous messaging app with Node.js & Express, featuring JWT authentication, Google OAuth, email verification, secure uploads, and MongoDB integration.

title: Human Activity Recognition
description: Applied Random Forest to classify human activities from sensor data. Achieved ~98% accuracy with detailed evaluation metrics and confusion matrix visualization.

title: Mealify Route
description: A modern, responsive web app for meal planning and recipes. Built with HTML and CSS for an engaging user interface.

title: Netflix Dashboard
description: A Tableau dashboard visualizing Netflix's content catalog. Includes genre analysis, country-wise availability, time-series trends, and interactive filters.

title: BloomWatch (Hackathon Project)
description: Frontend development in React for an interactive plant exploration app with AI-based identification, smart info cards, chat & lens bot, and gamified learning interface.

title: Movie Review Sentiment Analysis
description: Python-based sentiment analysis tool classifying movie reviews as positive or negative using NLTK and Naive Bayes. Includes feature analysis and real-time text classification.

title: Social App Backend
description: Full backend for a social networking app using Node.js, TypeScript, MongoDB, Socket.io for real-time chat, AWS S3 for media uploads, JWT/OAuth authentication, and GraphQL endpoints. Modular and scalable architecture.

title: E-Commerce Backend (NestJS)
description: Backend for an e-commerce platform built with NestJS and TypeScript, featuring modular architecture, scalable APIs, unit & e2e testing, and efficient server-side operations.

title: House Price Prediction
description: Machine learning project predicting house prices using property features. Includes data cleaning, visualization, EDA, model training with Linear Regression, and performance evaluation.

title: Carpool System
description: A carpool management system designed during a Microsoft internship. Includes high-fidelity UI design, full prototype, and case study presentation showcasing user flow, booking, and management features.
